rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ARNELLA FLEMING
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: Petitioner alleges that probate administration is necessary and the Public Administrator has agreed to administer the estate under Probate Code 7600 et seq.; however, Petitioner has not alleged under what statutory authority Conservator is allowed to distribute conservatorship assets to the Public Administrator under summary administration statutes. It is noted that Probate Code 7601 allows the Public Administrator to take possession of property that is subject to loss, injury, waste, etc.; however, custody is already in the hands of Conservator and no such situation exists. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 9th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SUEY KIM WONG LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/26/2021. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/12/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT LEE QUINN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Two-Year Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/26/2021. 1) 5/3/2021 Minutes: "The court advises that it will be ordering counsel to submit a two year account from Sep 28-2018 to Sep 28-2020 pursuant to Probate Code 10950 as a stand-alone petition. Attorney did not follow judicial instructions and instead filed it as an exhibit a to report of status. Attorney Roger Gross must file the account as a standalone petition that conforms to CRC, Probate Code, and LRSF and must pay a filing fee. 2) Please explain why attorney has not filed for an ex parte petition to increase bond or filing an amended I&A as told at the 5/3/20201 hearing. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/12/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VICTOR GARAY ROSARIO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Enforce Child Support Orders Against Estate And Against Estate Beneficiary (Hearing Not Yet Scheduled) (Placer County Department Of Child Support Services Exempt From The Payment Of Filing Fees Pursuant To Government Code Section 6103.9)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 07/19/2021. The following issues must be addressed: 1) Does the petitioner have standing to bring this petition under CCP section 708.440? Subdivision (b) only refers to the judgment debtor. 2) Notice of the hearing on this petition must be given on a mandatory Judicial Coucnil form DE-120. 3) The proof of service of this petition does not show that notice was given to Christine Ballardo. 4) The proof of service of the notice of lien does not show that notice was given to Christine Ballardo. 5) Has a statement of the date of the filing of the notice of lien been served under CCP section 708.410(c)? 6) Items 3a, 3c, and 4 of the notice of lien did not identify the Superior Courts of San Francisco and San Mateo Counties and their case numbers. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF OMAR ABDULLAH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/26/2021 1) Please explain why the attorney requests reimbursement of a $540.00 filing fee for General Conservatorship Petition on page 6 line 1 of the petition when the filing fee paid was $450.00. 2) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 3) The petition alleges the conservatorship has $0 in assets please explain how the requested attorney fees of $33,285.00 are reasonable. Please explain billing for a fee agreement in this matter. It appears there are several entries billing for communications with each other at the same firm. Several of the entries group things together into 3+ hour entries and examiner cannot determine how much time was spent on each entry. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/12/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PAULA BENNETT AS TRUSTEE OF THE HAGAN FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Relief Regarding Breach Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE DELORISA TURNER TRUST UNDER AGREEMENT DATED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Ownership Of Trust Property, For Specific Performance Of Executory Contract Of Sale Of Trust Property And For Order Authorizing
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 07/26/2021. 1) Notice of the hearing with a copy of the petition must be served on each person listed in Probate Code section 17203 if the matter concerns a trust. Probate Code section 851(b)(3). 2) If the lease was not assigned to the decedent's trust, the personal representative of the decedent's estate must be served in accordance with Probate Code section 851(a). If there is no probate, each beneficiary of the estate must be served in the same manner. 3) Item 1 of the DE-115 form must state the complete title of the pleading to which the notice relates. CRC 7.50. 4) The title of the pleading identified in the petitioner's verification does not appear identical to the title of the petition. 5) No proposed order has been provided by any party. One-sided paper copies must be mailed to Room 202 (or placed in a drop box outside Room 202). 6) No courtesy copies of documents filed by Dames Shouman and Jessica Esmay have been received. One-sided paper copies must be mailed to Room 202 (or placed in a drop box outside Room 202).
